page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor. It features 56 dedicated physical cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, with 1.0 thread per core. The system is equipped with 224.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear tradeoff between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the bottom 25% tier, with single-threaded gzip compression rated as poor. However, the 56 dedicated cores deliver average multi-core performance, as demonstrated by stress-ng multi-core, PassMark CPU, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression benchmarks. Memory bandwidth and database operations also perform in the middle 50% range.

Given its older Intel Xeon architecture, the ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge offers a cost-efficient option for workloads that require high parallelization rather than peak single-thread speed. It is suitable for multi-threaded applications, static web serving, Redis databases, and moderate LLM inference tasks using small to medium models. It is less suitable for single-threaded processing or workloads requiring high-speed local NVMe storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 56 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 224.0 GB of RAM (4.0 GB per core), 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no local storage or GPUs. Performance benchmarks show a distinct tradeoff: single-core performance is weak, falling in the bottom 25%, while multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations achieve average, middle-50% results. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for highly parallelized workloads that do not demand high single-thread speeds. It is best suited for multi-threaded applications, static web serving, Redis deployments, and moderate LLM inference tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.14xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 56 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 224 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core performance.

tagline: A dedicated 56-core x86_64 platform with balanced memory, optimized for highly parallelized multi-threaded workloads and database operations.
bullet_points: 56 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
224.0 GB of RAM providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM hypervisor virtualization
Average multi-core performance balanced by weaker single-core speeds
Well-suited for multi-threaded applications, Redis, and static web serving
